THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MERCEDES MARTINEZ, MIGUEL ANGEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 32 WOODLAND AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-06-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF MAY CLAIM A $1,575.00 OFFSET IN ANY AFFIRMATIVE ACTION BY DEFS. FOR UNPAID WAGES. DEFENDENTS WILL LEAVE ALL OF PLAINTIFFS FURNITURE, TOOLS AND APPLIANCES ON THE PROPERTY. SECURITY DEP. WILL BE ACCOUNTED FOR ACCORDING TO LAW. PLNTF AGREE TO SET ASIDE JUDGT & DISMISS FOR PERFORMAN
JUDGE PRO TEM - FREEMAN CULLOM, REPORTER - BOB BALIAN ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED.
